prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 1.8L AR00512 twin-cam inline-4 with a fully built AR00512 stroked to 2.0L using a 89mm forged crankshaft (Alfa Romeo GTA-spec) and 86mm forged pistons (JE 20.5:1 compression ratio) paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 12,000 RPM reliability.

Forced Induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom AR00512-specific exhaust manifold (Tubi Style) and a 38mm external wastegate (TurboSmart Comp-Gate 40). Intercooled via a custom air-to-water setup (PWR Racing) with a Bosch 044 fuel pump and ID1000cc injectors (Injector Dynamics) controlled by a Link G4+ Xtreme ECU.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (DFV) with custom valving for the 1750 GTV’s front MacPherson strut/rear live axle setup, paired with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) and a 22mm front sway bar (Hotchkis). Braking upgraded to 4-piston Wilwood calipers (Dynalite) with 280mm vented rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit (modified for the 1750 GTV’s chassis) with extended front fenders (2.5-inch flares), rear quarter panels (3-inch flares), and a ducktail spoiler (Seibon Carbon). Painted in Alfa Romeo’s historic ‘Rosso Competizione’ with matte black accents.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Recaro SRD bucket seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses) and a custom roll cage (Autopower bolt-in 6-point) wrapped in red Alcantara. Dashboard retains original gauges but adds a digital AIM MXS Strada dash with data logging and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede).

Wheels & Stance: 15x8 ET15 front and 15x9 ET10 rear wheels (BBS RS 012, gold) with 195/45R15 and 225/45R15 tires (Toyo R888R). Custom subframe spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive stance with poly bushings (Energy Suspension) to maintain geometry.
